title: BetterMan
description:
This modpack has added some horror and monster mods. In this modpack, players will face various terrifying creatures, dangerous environments, and so on. 
这个整合包加入了一些恐怖、怪物模组。在这个整合包中，玩家将面对各种恐怖生物、险恶环境等等。这个整合包还可以多人联机，快去和别人一起体验这个恐怖整合包吧！
body:
# BetterMan
## 更好的雾中人
#### Synopsis
This modpack has added some horror and monster mods. In this modpack, players will face various terrifying creatures, dangerous environments, and so on. 

#### 概要
这个整合包加入了一些恐怖、怪物模组。在这个整合包中，玩家将面对各种恐怖生物、险恶环境等等。这个整合包还可以多人联机，快去和别人一起体验这个恐怖整合包吧！


### Main Monster Mod
#### 主要怪物模组

·Whispers of the Wendigo

·The Starved Stalker

·The Midnight Lurker

·The Man From The Fog

·Sons Of Sins

·The Goatman

·The John Reborn From The Fog

·Eyes in the Darkness

·The End of Herobrine
